senses.gloss: to take (an item of clothing) off (one's or someone else's body), to remove; to pull off; to strip off
to remove by pulling, to take out, to pull out, to extract

examples.english: The dentist took out his tooth.

senses.gloss: to remove from power, to overthrow, to oust, to topple

examples.english: Muḥammad Ḥusnī Mubārak was overthrown in the year 2011.

senses.gloss: to divorce (one's husband) under a divorce settlement whereby the woman agrees to give away an amount of money or property to the man or to forgo her right thereto

examples.english: She divorced her husband with the bride-gift.

senses.gloss: to divorce (one's husband) under a divorce settlement whereby the woman agrees to give away an amount of money or property to the man or to forgo her right thereto; to separate from (one's wife) under such a settlement
to break into pieces, to break up, to disjoint
divorce from one's wife on her request, usually in exchange for the dower; khul', khula
